decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id (project_first-second-ave-sbs) already exists in the registry and already includes source 2010_03_10_brt_1st2nd_cb3 among its source_ids. The observation maps to the same real-world project: First Avenue/Second Avenue SBS, 8.5 miles from South Ferry to 125th Street, served by M15. Per rules, when the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is 'new' — the observation already resolves to that id and no link to a different record is needed.

evidence_refs.source_quote: First Avenue/Second Avenue Select Bus Service
8.5 miles from South Ferry to 125 th Street
Currently served by M15 bus route
